category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/amperser/proselint describes proselint as a linter for English prose.
source_facts.description says it is a linter for prose.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/amperser/proselint uses the project name proselint.
docs_sources: The official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface found for proselint.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository rather than a separate docs site.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/amperser/proselint is the source-control project URL.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL.
tags_sources: Official README describes command-line prose linting workflows.
